title: Symmetric Cryptography: One Key to Rule Them All
description: Deep dive into symmetric encryption - the fastest and most widely used form of cryptography. Master AES, understand block cipher modes, and learn why symmetric crypto remains quantum-resistant with larger key sizes.
learningObjectives: Explain how symmetric encryption works and its key management challenges
Distinguish between block ciphers and stream ciphers
Describe the structure and security of AES (Advanced Encryption Standard)
Understand different block cipher modes of operation (ECB, CBC, CTR, GCM)
Analyze why symmetric cryptography is more resistant to quantum attacks than asymmetric
Implement basic symmetric encryption using standard libraries
